Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and professional translation skills for employment (Target 4.4), while fostering an appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7).
evidence: cultivate students' professional Thai translation skills

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops professional skills for 'future translation work' and covers 'Translation of Tourism and Service Industry Texts,' supporting job creation in that sector (Target 8.9).
evidence: Translation of Tourism and Service Industry Texts
Translation of Technical and Business Texts

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course supports industry by teaching 'Translation of Technical and Business Texts' and 'technical manuals,' facilitating communication and technology transfer across language barriers (inferred link to Target 9.b).
evidence: Translation of Technical and Business Texts

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By teaching 'cross-cultural translation' and fostering an 'international perspective,' the course helps bridge communication gaps between different cultural groups, indirectly promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course supports Target 11.4 by teaching 'Translation of Literary and Cultural Texts,' which helps safeguard and promote cultural heritage by making it accessible across languages.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course promotes public access to information (Target 16.10) by teaching translation of 'news reports' and 'online articles,' and upholds rule of law by emphasizing 'Respect Copyright.'
evidence: Translation of News and Media Texts

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course fundamentally enables international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6) by building professional translation capacity and fostering an 'international perspective' between different cultures.
